prompt: Professional supplement product advertisement, clean and modern layout for social media, 1:1 square format. OVERALL BACKGROUND: soft light gray gradient (#ECEEF2), clean and minimal. TOP LEFT ZONE (left 45%, top 0-18%): small bold dark gray label text 'Disponible en:' (#333333, 13px), directly below it the Immunotec wordmark in medium blue (#1A5FA8, 18px bold). TOP RIGHT ZONE (right 55%, top 3-18%): large rounded-corner blue banner pill shape (#1A5FA8) with bold white uppercase text 'IMMUNOCAL PLATINUM' (font size 32px, tight tracking, centered in pill). LEFT COLUMN ZONE (left 50%, 18%-90%): COMPLETELY EMPTY — soft light gray background (#ECEEF2) with a very subtle warm golden radial glow in center, used for product compositing. RIGHT COLUMN ZONE (right 50%, 18%-85%): contains all benefit text. At top of right column, large bold uppercase text 'BENEFICIOS:' in deep blue (#1A5FA8, 26px). Below it three benefit rows each with: a solid filled blue circle (#1A5FA8) containing a white checkmark icon on the left, followed by dark gray body text (#1A1A1A, 15px, two-line wrap): first row 'Alivia el dolor crónico desde la raíz.', second row 'Reduce inflamación articular y muscular.', third row 'Regenera y fortalece tus articulaciones.'. Spacing between rows: 20px. BOTTOM RIGHT ZONE (right 50%, 80%-95%): italic medium blue text (#1A5FA8, 13px) 'Respaldado con más de 40 años de investigación científica'. BOTTOM RIGHT CORNER (right 15%, bottom 5%): small 'Immunotec' wordmark in blue (#1A5FA8, 11px). Horizontal divider line in light gray (#D0D3DA) separating benefit rows from bottom text. Typography: sans-serif clean font throughout. No clutter, no decorative elements beyond described.
negative_prompt: product images, bottles, boxes, any object in product zone, dark background, gradients other than described, extra text, watermarks, logos other than described, shadows on background, blurry text, distorted text, cluttered layout, red tones, green tones, ornate decorations, flowers, people
